perceptual_narrative_logs.visual_narrative_log: (1) A woman with long dark hair, wearing a black spaghetti strap top, lies on a bed with blue sheets and looks into the camera with a smiling, talkative expression. (2) The scene cuts to a full-body shot of a woman in a kitchen/bedroom setting wearing a mask, a floral shirt, and a long dark skirt; she points at the floor and reacts with soft gestures while pink hearts appear on screen. (3) The video cuts to a POV shot of the first woman looking down at a yoga mat, her expression turning into one of shock and disgust as she moves quickly.
perceptual_narrative_logs.audio_narrative_log: (1) A female voice speaks in a soft, melodic tone with gentle background music playing. (2) The audio shifts to a cute, twinkling sound effect with a female voice speaking very softly and high-pitched. (3) The audio concludes with a sudden increase in volume as the woman exclaims loudly and uses an expletive in a sharp, shocked tone.
perceptual_narrative_logs.text_narrative_log: (1) '天啊!!' (Oh my god!!) - Emotional hook. (2) '為什麼' (Why) - Curious tone. (3) '那麽受歡迎了' (So popular) - Explanatory. (4) '很溫柔' (Very gentle) - Descriptive. (5) '還女人' (Even more womanly) - Emphasis. (6) '當紅姐看到蟑螂的反應' (Red sister's reaction when seeing a cockroach) - Scenario title. (7) '這是一個什麼呀~' (What is this~) - Gentle inquiry. (8) '當我看到蟑螂的反應' (My reaction when seeing a cockroach) - Contrast title. (9) '哇' (Wow) - Shocked reaction.

visual_human_presence.countingEvidence: 1 female creator appearing in the beginning and end; 1 female character in the middle segment.
visual_human_presence.mainCharacterDescription: A woman with long black hair, wearing a black tank top and casual denim shorts in the final scene.

visual_scene_and_style.backgroundDescribe: First scene is a bedroom with light blue patterned sheets; middle scene is a domestic room with a bed, cabinets, and a kitchen faucet in the foreground.

narrative_and_purpose.narrativeStructure: Montage: Hook -> Contrast (Idealized Reaction -> Realistic Reaction)
narrative_and_purpose.mainPurpose: The video is a comedic sketch intended to entertain by contrasting a 'gentle' or feminine way of reacting to a cockroach (the 'Red Sister') with the creator's own visceral, aggressive reaction. It plays on social stereotypes of femininity versus reality.

social_sociology_tags.uniqueSignatures: Use of 'contrast' format and humorous subtitles.
social_sociology_tags.freeDescribe: The video leverages relatable domestic fears (cockroaches) and comedic timing to engage viewers, typical of personality-driven short-form social media content.
